name: Basic Free Green Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry all leafy greens thoroughly.
2. Shred the Romaine lettuce and set aside.
3. Shred the Iceberg lettuce and set aside.
4. Shred the Endive leaves and set aside.
5. If using Radishes, cut them into thin slices or leave whole.
6. Slice the cucumber thinly.
7. If using celery, dice it with the tops attached.
8. Place all shredded greens in a large bowl.
9. Add sliced radishes (or whole) to the bowl with the greens.
10. Add diced celery with tops to the bowl with the greens.
11. Toss gently until well combined and evenly distributed.
12. Adjust seasoning as desired with salt, pepper, or vinegar if needed.
13. Serve immediately for best flavor and texture.
